channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump Criticizes NATO Allies Over Lack of Support in Iran Conflict
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump criticised NATO allies on Monday for not supporting the United States in its conflict with Iran. He claimed that several NATO members went 'out of their way not to help' du...

item.title: Economic Impact of Gulf-based Indian Workers on Five States and the Need for Policy Attention
item.description: As India heads into state elections, manifestos focus heavily on domestic concerns such as healthcare, infrastructure, education, and employment. However, a significant constituency is being overlooke...

item.title: Prime Minister Nchemba directs urgent support for victims of Simu 2000 market fire
item.description: Prime Minister Dr Mwigulu Nchemba has instructed immediate action to help traders affected by the recent fire that swept through the Mawasiliano market, popularly known as Simu 2000, in Sinza Ward, Ub...

item.title: Investigation Reveals Use of Paramilitary Border Patrol Units in Urban Immigration Raids
item.description: In a detailed investigation, WIRED analyzed DHS records and body camera footage to expose the deployment of paramilitary Border Patrol units, BORTAC and BORSTAR, in urban immigration operations under ...

item.title: Low-income parents call for urgent government action as rising costs drive families into survival mode
item.description: Ella Michalski, a member of the Changing Realities project, writes about the worsening conditions faced by low-income families in the UK. She argues that what was once called the 'cost of living crisi...

item.title: Supreme Court Transfers Malda Violence Probe to NIA, Directs Action Against State Officials
item.description: The Supreme Court has stepped in to address the serious situation arising from mob violence in Malda, West Bengal, handing over the investigation to the National Investigation Agency (NIA). This decis...

item.title: SSGC found negligent in Orangi Town gas explosion, ordered to pay Rs30 million
item.description: KARACHI: A court in Karachi has held Sui Southern Gas Company (SSGC) responsible for negligence in connection with a deadly gas explosion that killed two residents in Orangi Town's Millat Colony in Oc...

item.title: US Sets Final Deadline for Iran Ceasefire Amid Escalating Conflict; Israel Targets IRGC Leader
item.description: Tensions between the United States, Israel, and Iran escalated further as President Trump reaffirmed a final deadline for Iran to accept a US-proposed ceasefire. Iran rejected the proposal, issuing a ...

item.title: Alberta First Nations challenge proposed independence referendum in court
item.description: Several Alberta First Nations are preparing to challenge a proposed referendum question that would ask residents whether the province should become independent. Leaders argue that the petition process...

item.title: White House Clarifies Rumours About Donald Trump's Health Amid Easter Weekend Absence
item.description: The White House has refuted widespread social media claims suggesting that President Donald Trump was hospitalised in critical condition. The rumour, which began circulating on April 4, 2026, alleged ...

item.title: Rangers Coach Ilechukwu Believes NPFL Title Race is Still Wide Open With Five Games Left
item.description: The NPFL title race remains wide open with five games to go, according to Rangers International FC's technical adviser, Fidelis Ilechukwu. Despite Rangers' goalless draw with Barau FC at home, the Enu...

item.title: Rawalpindi authorities impose Section 144 ahead of PTI protests at Adiala jail
item.description: Rawalpindi district administration has enforced Section 144 across the city for 15 days, covering April 6 to April 20, in anticipation of PTI’s planned protests near Adiala jail and a separate rally o...

item.title: Imelda Schweighart Represents Philippines in Inaugural Miss Grand International All Stars Edition
item.description: Former Miss Philippines Earth titleholder Imelda Schweighart has been officially announced as one of the candidates for the first-ever Miss Grand International All Stars edition. The Filipino-German b...

item.title: Adriana Rivas, Former Pinochet Operative, to Face Extradition from Australia to Chile Over 1970s Kidnapping Allegations
item.description: Adriana Elcira Rivas, a former nanny in Bondi and now in her seventies, will be extradited from Australia to Chile to face charges of aggravated kidnapping during Augusto Pinochet’s military dictators...

item.title: Three Women Confronting Their Past in Kehinde Fadipe’s ‘In Such Tremendous Heat’
item.description: In ‘In Such Tremendous Heat’, Kehinde Fadipe introduces three women—Amaka, Dara, and Lilian—who each struggle with their pasts while navigating the high-pressure world of Singapore. Amaka uses shoppin...

item.title: Protesters End Sit-In and Reopen Karakoram Highway After Successful Negotiations
item.description: Protesters blocking the Karakoram Highway (KKH) in the Thore area of Diamer have ended their sit-in and reopened the road to traffic following successful talks with the district administration. The pr...

item.title: The Influence of Billionaire Wealth on Public Governance
item.description: A concerning trend is emerging globally where concentrated wealth is beginning to influence governance far beyond traditional political processes. Citizens still vote and parliaments sit, but key deci...

item.title: Winnipeg Campus Radio Stations Examine the Role of Community Broadcasting
item.description: Campus radio stations in Winnipeg are actively engaging in discussions about the evolving role of community-oriented broadcasting. These stations, often run by students and volunteers, serve as import...

item.title: Renewable Energy Growth Expected to Surge Following Middle East Conflict, IEA Says
item.description: According to the International Energy Agency (IEA) chief, the ongoing conflict in the Middle East is surprisingly expected to trigger a significant surge in the adoption and development of renewable e...

item.title: India achieves key milestone in developing domestic nuclear fuel capability
item.description: India has taken a major step towards producing its own nuclear fuel as a domestically designed reactor has successfully begun a controlled nuclear reaction. This marks a critical milestone before the ...
